## Summary

Describe the user-visible or architectural outcome and why this change is needed.

## Verification

List the exact commands and observable results used to verify the change.

## Decision impact

State whether this preserves the Product Spec and accepted ADRs. Link the governing section or explain the explicitly proposed decision change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I used Bun 1.3.10 and kept dependency versions exact.
- [ ] I added or updated tests before changing executable behavior.
- [ ] I ran formatting, linting, typechecking, tests, and relevant build or browser checks.
- [ ] I preserved UPPERCASE enum-like state values and module boundaries.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, private source, local absolute paths, generated output, or machine-specific binaries.
- [ ] I updated derived documentation and acceptance evidence when behavior changed.
- [ ] This pull request does not silently amend the canonical Product Spec.
